item.title: Netflix boss defends bid for Warner Bros as Paramount deadline looms
item.description: Ted Sarandos says his company's offer is better for industry growth as it is "buying assets we don't currently have".

item.title: Briton among 19 killed in Nepal bus crash
item.description: Nepalese police say the British national was a 24-year-old man.

item.title: What is SEND and how many children get support?
item.description: The government is due to publish plans to reform the special educational needs system in a new White Paper.

item.title: McIlroy finishes one shot behind Genesis winner Bridgeman
item.description: Rory McIlroy shoots a four-under-par 67 but it is not enough to overhaul winner Jacob Bridgeman, who wins by one shot at the Genesis Invitational in L...

item.title: Armed man killed after entering secure perimeter of Trump's residence, Secret Service says
item.description: The suspect was carrying a shotgun and fuel can when he was killed, officers say, while Trump was in Washington DC at the time.
